dealSummary: Jeff Bezos' AI startup, Prometheus, secured a $12 billion round from investors including JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs and BlackRock at a $41 billion valuation.
Blockchain technology company Digital Asset raised a $355 million round led by Andreessen Horowitz's a16z crypto.
Italian fintech startup Satispay is planning to raise €120 million in fresh funding from investors including Addition, Lightrock and Greyhound Capital, Bloomberg reported.
Vancouver-based fintech startup Koho secured a C$130 million ($93.1 million) round from investors including Mubadala and Savano Capital.
Current, the developer of a consumer fintech platform, received an $80 million Series E led by Springcoast Partners at a $1.5 billion valuation.
Agentic AI database platform specialist PhoenixAI raised an $80 million round led by Sky9 Capital.
Endurance Energy, which harvests geothermal energy from the ocean, raised a $54 million Series A led by Founders Fund.
Coram AI, which offers a physical security platform, raised a $35 million Series B led by Ansa Capital and Battery Ventures.
Consumer advocacy startup Turnout secured a $35 million Series A led by HighPost Capital at a $400 million valuation.
Capsa AI, a London-based provider of a due diligence AI operating system for private capital, received an $18 million Series A led by TX Ventures and Pivot Investment Partners.
Mendo, a Paris-based provider of tools for enterprise AI adoption, raised a €12 million Series A led by investors including Educapital, Ventech and Ovni Capital.
